name: Orange Sea Scallops- Mhfj92b
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tough stems from spinach and rinse well.
2. Soak and clean the spinach thoroughly. Shake off excess water and place in a pot with a lid.
3. In a small bowl, combine orange juice, Dijon mustard, and black pepper. Whisk well.
4. Slowly drizzle in extra virgin olive oil while whisking continuously. Stir in 1 tablespoon of chopped chives and season with salt. Set the dressing aside.
5. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add half the scallops to the hot oil and cook for 4-5 minutes, or until opaque and lightly golden. Shake the pan and turn the scallops once during cooking. Cook the second batch of scallops in one layer.
6. While the scallops are cooking, wilt the spinach over medium heat for about 3 minutes, covered, stirring once.
7. When the scallops are finished, drain the spinach well and arrange it on a large serving plate. Gently pull the spinach apart slightly so it comes close to the rim of the plate.
8. Center the cooked scallops attractively atop the spinach. Pour the orange dressing over all and garnish with the remaining chives and orange zest.
9. Serve immediately. Per serving: 202 calories, 10g fat, 37mg cholesterol.
